## What does this PR do?

<!-- Brief description — what extension(s) are you adding or changing? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Folder name is kebab-case (e.g. `professional-email`)
- [ ] `extension.yaml` has all required fields (name, description, author, version, tags, icon, type)
- [ ] YAML starts with `# cai-extension` on the first line
- [ ] Icon is a valid [SF Symbol](https://developer.apple.com/sf-symbols/) name
- [ ] Tested in Cai before submitting
- [ ] No API keys or secrets in the YAML (use `setup` fields instead)
- [ ] If `shell` or `applescript` type: command is safe and well-documented
